SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.ReferentialPayload

Packages that use ReferentialPayload
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.expiry
Expiry policy and extractor abstractions for controlling cached payload lifetime.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload
Payload envelope, enrichment, and post-recovery handling.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.store
Store abstraction and default in-memory implementation.
com.societegenerale.failover.store
Concrete FailoverStore implementations.
com.societegenerale.failover.store.mapper
Spring JDBC RowMapper for the failover store table.
com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant
Multi-tenant failover store with per-tenant routing.
com.societegenerale.failover.store.resolver
SQL query and column-type resolvers for the JDBC failover store.

    Method
    Description

    Auto-configured JDBC TenantStoreFactory for the TABLE_PREFIX strategy.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReferentialPayload<T>
    ReferentialPayload.copy()
    Creates a shallow copy of this payload, preserving all field values.
    ReferentialPayload<T>
    DefaultPayloadEnricher.enrichOnRecover(Failover failover, Class<T> clazz, ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload, Throwable cause)
     
    ReferentialPayload<T>
    PayloadEnricher.enrichOnRecover(Failover failover, Class<T> clazz, ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload, Throwable cause)
    Enriches the payload after it has been recovered from the failover store.
    ReferentialPayload<T>
    DefaultPayloadEnricher.enrichOnStore(Failover failover, Class<T> clazz, ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
     
    ReferentialPayload<T>
    PayloadEnricher.enrichOnStore(Failover failover, Class<T> clazz, ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Enriches the payload before it is written to the failover store.
    ReferentialPayload<T>
    ReferentialPayload.withUpToDate(boolean upToDate)
    Sets the upToDate flag and returns this for chaining.

    PayloadEnricher.enrichOnRecover(Failover failover, Class<T> clazz, ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload, Throwable cause)
    Enriches the payload after it has been recovered from the failover store.

    DefaultPayloadEnricher.enrichOnStore(Failover failover, Class<T> clazz, ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
     
    ReferentialPayload<T>
    PayloadEnricher.enrichOnStore(Failover failover, Class<T> clazz, ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Enriches the payload before it is written to the failover store.
    protected T
    DefaultPayloadEnricher.extractPayload(Class<T> clazz, ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Extracts the payload from the referential wrapper.

    Extension point for adding custom entries to the recovery metadata.

  • Uses of ReferentialPayload in com.societegenerale.failover.core.store

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.core.store that return types with arguments of type ReferentialPayload
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    DefaultFailoverStore.find(String name, String key)
    Looks up a payload by name and key, returning a copy with upToDate forced to false if found.
    Optional<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    FailoverStore.find(String name, String key)
    Looks up a referential payload by its logical name and key.
    List<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    DefaultFailoverStore.findAll(String name)
    Returns all payloads for the given name, each as a defensive copy with upToDate forced to false.
    List<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    FailoverStore.findAll(String name)
    Looks up every referential payload stored under the given logical name.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.core.store with parameters of type ReferentialPayload
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    DefaultFailoverStore.delete(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Deletes a copy of the given payload with upToDate forced to false, then delegates to the underlying store.
    void
    FailoverStore.delete(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Removes a referential payload entry from the store.
    void
    DefaultFailoverStore.store(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Stores a copy of the given payload with upToDate forced to false, then delegates to the underlying store.
    void
    FailoverStore.store(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Persists or updates a referential payload entry.

  • Uses of ReferentialPayload in com.societegenerale.failover.store

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.store that return types with arguments of type ReferentialPayload
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    FailoverStoreAsync.find(String name, String key)
    Executes find synchronously on the calling thread — the result is needed immediately.
    Optional<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    FailoverStoreCaffeine.find(String name, String key)
    Looks up a payload by referential name and key.
    Optional<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    FailoverStoreInmemory.find(String name, String key)
    Looks up a payload by name and key, returning a defensive copy if found.
    Optional<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    FailoverStoreJdbc.find(String name, String key)
    Looks up the payload for the given name and key.
    List<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    FailoverStoreAsync.findAll(String name)
    Executes findAll synchronously on the calling thread — the result is needed immediately, so no executor boundary is crossed (same rationale as FailoverStoreAsync.find(java.lang.String, java.lang.String)).
    List<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    FailoverStoreCaffeine.findAll(String name)
    Returns defensive copies of all cached entries whose composite key is prefixed by name##.
    List<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    FailoverStoreInmemory.findAll(String name)
    Returns defensive copies of all entries whose composite key is prefixed by name##.
    List<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    FailoverStoreJdbc.findAll(String name)
    Returns all rows for the given referential name.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.store with parameters of type ReferentialPayload
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    FailoverStoreAsync.delete(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Submits the delete operation to the executor.
    void
    FailoverStoreCaffeine.delete(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Invalidates the cache entry for the given payload.
    void
    FailoverStoreInmemory.delete(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Removes the entry for the given payload's (name, key) pair.
    void
    FailoverStoreJdbc.delete(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Deletes the row identified by the payload's name and key.
    void
    FailoverStoreAsync.store(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Submits the store operation to the executor.
    void
    FailoverStoreCaffeine.store(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Stores a defensive copy of the payload in the cache.
    void
    FailoverStoreInmemory.store(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Stores a defensive copy of the payload, keyed by its referential name and key.
    void
    FailoverStoreJdbc.store(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Persists or updates the payload.
    Constructor parameters in com.societegenerale.failover.store with type arguments of type ReferentialPayload
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    FailoverStoreJdbc(org.springframework.jdbc.core.JdbcTemplate jdbcTemplate, FailoverStoreQueryResolver failoverStoreQueryResolver, org.springframework.jdbc.core.RowMapper<ReferentialPayload<T>> rowMapper)
    Constructs the store and resolves the merge query at construction time.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReferentialPayload<T>
    ReferentialPayloadRowMapper.mapRow(ResultSet rs, int rowNum)
    Maps the current ResultSet row to a ReferentialPayload.

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant that return types with arguments of type ReferentialPayload
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    MultiTenantFailoverStore.find(String name, String key)
    Looks up a payload by name and key in the current tenant's failover store.
    List<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    MultiTenantFailoverStore.findAll(String name)
    Returns all payloads for the given name from the current tenant's store only.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant with parameters of type ReferentialPayload
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    MultiTenantFailoverStore.delete(ReferentialPayload<T> payload)
    Deletes the payload from the current tenant's failover store.
    void
    MultiTenantFailoverStore.store(ReferentialPayload<T> payload)
    Stores the payload in the current tenant's failover store.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    DefaultFailoverStoreQueryResolver.buildInsertMergeParams(ReferentialPayload<T> p)
     
    <T> Object[]
    FailoverStoreQueryResolver.buildInsertMergeParams(ReferentialPayload<T> payload)
    Builds the parameter array for INSERT and all MERGE/upsert queries.

    DefaultFailoverStoreQueryResolver.buildUpdateParams(ReferentialPayload<T> p)
     
    <T> Object[]
    FailoverStoreQueryResolver.buildUpdateParams(ReferentialPayload<T> payload)
    Builds the parameter array for the UPDATE query (SET columns first, then WHERE predicate).
